items.name: MILTON
items.description: MILTON provides an enterprise-grade AI compliance engine that transforms source data into audit-ready evidence for externally and internally regulated industries.

items.name: Andaluz Casa
items.description: A complete holiday house rental website featuring headless CMS support, extensive property information with markdown formatting, integrated contact forms, and a custom blog.

items.name: Munilytics
items.description: A high-performance analytics engine and ETL pipeline that transforms complex Kolada database metrics into actionable efficiency insights for Swedish municipalities, utilizing PostgreSQL OLAP cubes and vector math.
